_meta.partitionWarning: STRICT PARTITION — cruise/maritime ONLY. No J-1 cross-contamination in this domain.
_meta.scaffoldNote: Wage scales, daily-pulse rules, and cruise-line-specific contract clauses to be uploaded by GHR Cruise Operations.

knowledgeBase.content: MLC 2006 (ILO) governs minimum standards for seafarer working conditions: hours of rest, accommodation, wages, food, medical care, repatriation. Every CTI cruise placement must pre-screen against MLC compliance. Violation flags go directly to Robert + legal.

8 cruise lines side-by-side comparable in the Contracts Dashboard (March 2026 source). See Contracts page for full clause-by-clause comparison: Overview · Fees · Obligations · Legal · Insurance · Positions · Compliance · Pros/Cons.

Position categories: Hotel/Hospitality (housekeeping, F&B, bar, galley), Marine (deck, engine), Entertainment, Spa/Salon, Retail, Casino. Wage scales vary per cruise line and per MLC minimum. Confidential — agents NEVER quote a wage to a candidate without manager confirmation.
Daily Pulse = automated cruise-recruitment status report. Rules pending upload — to be defined by GHR Cruise Operations. Reference only.

Standard placement lifecycle: candidate sourcing → screening → STCW certification check → medical (ENG-1 or equivalent) → cruise-line approval → embarkation. Typical 4–10 weeks. STCW and medical are hard gates — no embarkation without both.

Per-cruise-line requirements (medical, STCW, language, contract length) cataloged in the Contracts Dashboard. Daily Pulse and the Contracts page are the single sources of truth — do not duplicate values here; reference them.

Crew contract documents required pre-embarkation: signed seafarer employment agreement (SEA), MLC-compliant wage statement, repatriation guarantee, grievance procedure acknowledgement. Missing any one = no embarkation.

Cruise candidates and J-1 candidates are separate populations with separate sponsor frameworks, separate dashboards, and separate compliance regimes. Under no circumstances should an agent move data, candidates, or contract terms across this boundary without Robert's explicit sign-off.

rules.if: STCW + ENG-1 medical + signed SEA all present
Amendment touches fees, indemnity, or termination
Hours-of-rest violation, wage shortfall, or repatriation breach reported
